text.content: P1 Instagram Reel — This 3D-printed Royal Pop kit just launched.
AP x Swatch Royal Pop wrist conversion kit launches
This 3D-printed Royal Pop kit just launched.
Copy

{
  "hook_0_3s": "This 3D-printed Royal Pop kit just launched.",
  "body_3_25s": "Here’s the Cults3D adapter—no tool, no pouch, no spare spring bars. Just a printed cradle that wobbles on the lugs. Our Premium bundle: machined aluminium, hand-finished end-links, microfibre pouch, spare screw bars, and a precision-fit that seats flush with the case-back. Same price, zero compromise.",
  "cta_25_30s": "Which one would you trust on your Royal Pop? Comment WRIST.",
  "b_roll": [
    "Close-up: Cults3D adapter clipped onto Royal Pop—shows visible gap at lugs.",
    "Side-by-side on wrist: Cults3D (loose) vs Premium (flush).",
    "Tool roll call: Cults3D (empty) vs Premium (pouch contents laid out).",
    "Text overlay: 'Tool included? No / Yes' (appears on screen for 3 seconds)."
  ],
  "caption": "This 3D-printed Royal Pop kit just launched. \n\nCults3D adapter: no tool, no pouch, printed cradle wobbles. Royal Pop Premium bundle: machined aluminium, hand-finished end-links, microfibre pouch, spare screw bars, zero wobble. \n\nWhich would you trust? Comment WRIST for waitlist link. \n\nIndependent brand. Not affiliated with Swatch or Audemars Piguet.",
  "hashtags": [
    "#royalpop",
    "#apswatch",
    "#watchstrap",
    "#horology",
    "#watchmod",
    "#premiumcraft",
    "#watchcommunity"
  ]
}

P3 TikTok — This is why most Royal Pop straps feel cheap.
Royal Pop strap ecosystem exploding: Helvetus, Wristbuddys, Wisstraps, Delugs
This is why most Royal Pop straps feel cheap.
Copy

{
  "hook_0_3s": "This is why most Royal Pop straps feel cheap.",
  "body_3_25s": "Generic straps sit loose—gaps at the lugs, wobble on the wrist. Our kit clips in with a machined cradle adapter. Tight tolerance, zero play. The silicone strap? Hand-finished, no mould lines. No shortcuts.",
  "cta_25_30s": "Early access list—link in bio.",
  "b_roll": [
    "Slow-motion clip: adapter snapping into Royal Pop case-back, no gap at lugs",
    "Side-by-side: loose generic strap vs. flush adapter fit",
    "Close-up: silicone strap texture, no seams, brushed steel clasp",
    "Wrist shot: adapter seated, no wobble during movement"
  ],
  "caption": "This is why most Royal Pop straps feel cheap. Our kit clips in with a machined cradle adapter—tight tolerance, zero play. Early access: link in bio. Independent brand. Not affiliated with Swatch or Audemars Piguet.",
  "hashtags": [
    "#royalpop",
    "#apswatch",
    "#watchstrap",
    "#horology",
    "#watchmods",
    "#wristcheck",
    "#watchcommunity"
  ]
}

P4 Instagram Feed — The Royal Pop deserves better than a random strap.

We’re bu

The Royal Pop deserves better than a random strap.

We’re building a premium wrist conversion kit—adapter, strap, tool, and pouch. No scratches. No wobble. Just
Copy

{
  "caption": "The Royal Pop deserves better than a random strap.\n\nWe’re building a premium wrist conversion kit—adapter, strap, tool, and pouch. No scratches. No wobble. Just a proper wristwatch that stays on your wrist, not in your pocket.\n\nEarly access opens soon. Comment WRIST for waitlist link.\n\nIndependent brand. Not affiliated with Swatch or Audemars Piguet.",

P5 Instagram Reel — Day 2: Testing the adapter’s grip.
Day 2: Testing the adapter’s grip.
Copy

{
  "hook_0_3s": "Day 2: Testing the adapter’s grip.",
  "body_3_25s": "If it’s going on the wrist, it can’t fall off. We machined a precision-fit cradle that seats into the lugs—zero wobble. The interior is lined with microfibre to protect the case-back. Shake test: passed. No scratches, no movement.",
  "cta_25_30s": "Tell me what this should cost—comment below.",
  "b_roll": [
    "Close-up of adapter clipping onto Royal Pop lugs (slow-motion)",
    "Hand shaking the watch vigorously, adapter stays locked",
    "Macro shot of microfibre-lined interior against case-back",
    "Text overlay: 'Scratch-free. Secure.' (white, bold, bottom-third)"
  ],
  "caption": "Day 2: Testing the adapter’s grip. If it’s going on the wrist, it can’t fall off. Precision-fit cradle + microfibre lining = zero scratches, zero wobble. \n\nIndependent brand. Not affiliated with Swatch or Audemars Piguet.",
  "hashtags": [
    "#royalpop",
    "#watchstrap",
    "#horology",
    "#watchmod",
    "#watchaccessories",
    "#precisionfit",
    "#watchcommunity"
  ]
}
